shelfmark: Bodl. MS heb. e 105/53 + Bodl. MS heb. e 105/54
description: Probably non-Geniza. Address of a letter in the hand of Yaʿaqov Ḥayy b. Avraham Mondolfo of Siena to the rabbis and sages of the yeshiva ("residenza") of London (לונדון, לונדריס). Dated: 15 Adar 5454 AM = 12 March 1694 CE. There are interlinear corrections as well as citations in the right margin for the biblical verses alluded to. See also Bodl. MS heb. e 105/55 (PGPID 19483).
description_he: מכתב בעברית מ-Siena ל-London. מוחזק בבודליאן אוקספורד.
